nasb.text: There were capitals on the two pillars, even above and close to the rounded projection which was beside the network; and the pomegranates numbered two hundred in rows around both capitals.

esv.text: The capitals were on the two pillars and also above the rounded projection which was beside the latticework. There were two hundred pomegranates in two rows all around, and so with the other capital.

cnv.text: 兩根柱子上柱頂的鼓肚上，網子旁邊，各有石榴二百個，分兩行環繞著。

ccb.text: 在每个柱冠靠近网子鼓起来的地方围着两行石榴，共二百个。
